sections.paragraph:
Original: ארפּד

Transliteration: 'arpâd

Phonetic: ar-pawd'

BDB Definition:

Arpad or Arphad = "I shall be spread out (or supported)"
  1. a city in northern Syria cited as an example of the Assyrian conquest

Origin: from H7502

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
